body:
Adds tests for splitting output based on time-interval, e.g., 

```Julia
ow = JLD2OutputWriter(model, (; u);
                      filename = "test.jld2",
                      ...
                      file_splitting = TimeInterval(3seconds)
                      )
```

labels.description: Tests get priority in case of emergency evacuation
labels.name: testing 🧪

title: Tests for splitting output files using `TimeInterval`
